_doc: Reference-corpus analysis constraints (audit 2026-07-12). Corpus provenance and license decisions are owned by agentic-docs/licensing.md; audio remains scratchpad-only. This file owns known limitations: compare.py applies mask_after_s and fail-closed invalid_axes, then surfaces the resolved contract in its report.

corpora.corpus: A43 original Roland TR-808 short kick (Freesound 9698 HQ preview)

invalid_axes.lufs: Preview gain and hardware output setting are not documented; absolute loudness is not a fit target.
invalid_axes.velocity_loudness: Only one hit at an undocumented control setting is available.
invalid_axes.decay: The author explicitly labels this a short kick and edited it in an Akai S5000; its tail is not a neutral decay-control reference.
invalid_axes.release: The source is an edited one-shot.

corpora.notes: Original hardware is explicit, but this is an edited lossy preview. Trust onset, pitch sweep, and spectral balance only. Canonical processing: decode, mono fold-down, resample to 48 kHz, prepend 30 ms, pad to 2.5 s.

corpora.corpus: A43 original Roland TR-808 snare (Freesound 11378 HQ preview)

invalid_axes.lufs: Preview gain and hardware output setting are not documented; absolute loudness is not a fit target.
invalid_axes.velocity_loudness: Only one hit at undocumented tone/snappy settings is available.
invalid_axes.decay: The author explicitly discloses further editing and processing in Bias Peak.
invalid_axes.release: The source is an edited one-shot.

corpora.notes: Original hardware is explicit, but this is an edited lossy preview. Trust onset, resonant modes, and noise-band balance only. Canonical processing matches the kick entry.

corpora.corpus: A43 original Roland TR-808 maraca (Freesound 9697 HQ preview)

invalid_axes.lufs: Preview gain and hardware output setting are not documented; absolute loudness is not a fit target.
invalid_axes.decay: The 35 ms source was edited in an Akai S5000 and cannot establish the natural tail independently.
invalid_axes.release: The source is an edited one-shot.

corpora.notes: Original hardware is explicit, but this is an edited lossy preview. Trust onset and noise-band shape only. Canonical processing matches the kick entry.

corpora.corpus: A43 original Roland TR-808 isolated voices (Freesound pack 532 HQ previews)

invalid_axes.lufs: Preview gain, individual instrument level, and hardware output setting are not documented; absolute loudness is not a fit target.
invalid_axes.velocity_loudness: Only one hit per voice at undocumented control settings is available.

corpora.notes: Original hardware is explicit, but the author discloses editing and the staged files are lossy HQ previews. Use as a structural tune source, never as sole proof of original-unit fidelity. Canonical processing: decode, mono fold-down, resample to 48 kHz, prepend 30 ms, pad to 2.5 s.

corpora.corpus: Theofanis Siassios original Roland TR-808 pattern recording (Wikimedia Commons)

invalid_axes.attack: The source is a mixed pattern, not an isolated aligned hit.
invalid_axes.lufs: Pattern mix levels and output gain are undocumented.
invalid_axes.release: The source is a continuous pattern.
invalid_axes.velocity_loudness: Accent and mix settings are undocumented.

corpora.notes: Independent original hardware and VRT-confirmed provenance. Held-out arrangement listening only; never use it as an isolated-hit metric target.
16 velocity layers, natural decays ~16 s. Trustworthy full-band. Corpus samples every 3rd key only.

invalid_axes.lufs: Corpus files are level-normalized; absolute loudness is not preserved.
invalid_axes.velocity_loudness: Level normalization destroys the recorded velocity-to-loudness curve.
invalid_axes.release: A hard release gate follows note-off; release behavior is not natural.

corpora.notes: BLIND >8 kHz (ultrasonic gate is the only guard). Level-normalized: velocity->loudness curves are FAKE here, fit velocity->timbre only. Hard release gate ~0.3 s after the 3 s note-off: masked.

invalid_axes.lufs: Corpus files are level-normalized; absolute loudness is not preserved.
invalid_axes.velocity_loudness: Level normalization destroys the recorded velocity-to-loudness curve.
invalid_axes.release: A hard release gate follows note-off; release behavior is not natural.

invalid_axes.lufs: Corpus files are level-normalized; absolute loudness is not preserved.
invalid_axes.velocity_loudness: Level normalization destroys the recorded velocity-to-loudness curve.
invalid_axes.release: A hard release gate follows note-off; release behavior is not natural.

invalid_axes.lufs: Corpus files are level-normalized; absolute loudness is not preserved.
invalid_axes.velocity_loudness: Level normalization destroys the recorded velocity-to-loudness curve.
invalid_axes.release: A hard release gate follows note-off; release behavior is not natural.

invalid_axes.lufs: Corpus files are peak-normalized; absolute loudness is not preserved.
invalid_axes.velocity_loudness: Peak normalization destroys the recorded velocity-to-loudness curve.

corpora.notes: 4 velocity layers (pp/mp/f/ff), full-band, trustworthy attack + harmonic balance. Peak-normalized: velocity->loudness FAKE, fit velocity->timbre only. Tails hard-trimmed while ringing (pp files down to 0.36 s): decay/t60/release axes untrustworthy. ~5 Hz AM on low notes is the built-in amp tremolo (preset effect, not a fit target).

invalid_axes.attack: Pianet sticky-pad excitation is not an electric-piano hammer reference.
invalid_axes.velocity_loudness: Only two layers are available; do not infer a velocity curve.

corpora.notes: 2 layers only; long natural decays (~35 s low). Sticky-pad excitation, no hammer: decay-shape sanity only, never attack fitting.

invalid_axes.lufs: Corpus files are level-normalized; absolute loudness is not preserved.
invalid_axes.velocity_loudness: Level normalization destroys the recorded velocity-to-loudness curve.
invalid_axes.release: A hard release gate follows note-off; release behavior is not natural.

corpora.notes: Same NSynth caveats as guitar-acoustic. Sources triaged for tine/reed-EP character (SOURCES.txt): 098/002/001 bark ladders, 069 two-stage decay; 003 has 5.4 Hz tremolo (held out).

corpora.corpus: DRSKit + MuldjordKit + NakedDrums (DrumGizmo/sfz) + VSCO-2-CE concert BD
corpora.notes: Close-mic, trustworthy full-band. Concert BD is an openness ANCHOR, not a kit kick: expect structural crest-gate reds against it (slow bloom); pair primary comparisons with the kit-kick refs.

invalid_axes.tail: Overhead references contain room bleed; tail similarity is not an isolated cymbal-decay measure.

corpora.notes: Overhead mics carry room bleed; attack-window axes are more trustworthy than tails.

invalid_axes.tail: Overhead references contain room bleed; tail similarity is not an isolated instrument-decay measure.
